reviews.comment:
Buen dia,el dia 20/02/22,volvia de vacaciones con la flia y tuve un inconveniente mecanico en mi camioneta..me encontraba en 4 bocas con destino a cordoba.
Llame a ypf boxes de curuzu cuatia.
Quiero recalcar con este comentario, la Exelente atencion y predispocion con la que fui atendido.Muchas gracias.

(Translated by Google)
Good day, on February 20, 2022, I was returning from vacation with my family and had a mechanical problem with my truck. I was in Cuatro Bocas on my way to Córdoba.
I called the YPF gas station in Curuzú Cuatiá.
I want to emphasize with this comment the excellent service and helpfulness with which I was assisted. Thank you very much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12844074835254669240/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtN08zQWp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención precio y calidad. Sobre todo la señora que te lleva el desayuno a la mesa. Muy amorosa. Súper desayuno con taza grande tostado y jugo a un precio único.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, price, and quality. Especially the lady who brings breakfast to the table. Very kind. Super breakfast with a large mug, toast, and juice at a great price.
